title: The Horrors Beneath
description: The horror mods used by NovaIsS2pid in his videos. (Currently not being updated)
body:
THIS IS NOT BEING MADE INTO VIDEOS (WE CANCELED OUR PLANS FOR THIS PACK IN CHANGE FOR SOMETHING ELSE)
# The Horrors Beneath
The Horrors Beneath is a modpack used in my horror videos, The updated with consist of updating each episode with adding more, the way to count the days by updated is in the 1.1/1.2 etc. If you see one with 1.1.1/1.1.2 etc then those are just bug fixed

If you would like to watch any of these videos then feel free to check them out at [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@NovaIsS2pid)

## Extra Info
This mod aims to add to horror aspects in minecraft, the mod mostly adds ambient noises to add to the atmosphere, entities that you will see throughout, and voice chat for those in multiplayer.

If i said what all was in this it would take away from the frightfullness of the pack so I'm not sure its a good idea to do that

### ?
~~You are not safe. You will be found. Stay hidden while you can.~~
